messages.content: For 8360 AOS-CX 10_10, how do you document?

To document, follow the documented procedure: 1. Switch-1 Ingress 2. Switch-1 Egress 3. Switch-2Ingress 4. Switch-2Egress 5. AtSwitch-1(Ingress)thepacketfromHost-1isstillanormalVLANpacket,thereforeIngressVLAN 6. AtSwitch-1(Egress)thepacketfromHost-1hasbeenencapsulatedintoaVXLANUDPtunnel 7. AtSwitch-2(Ingress)thepacketfromHost-1isdecapsulatedfromitsVXLANheadersothatitcan 8. AtSwitch-2(Egress)thepacketwhicharrivedfromSwitch-1hasbeendecapsulatedandbecomes 9. BegindefininganIPv4ACLnamedFILTER_TO_HOST_B: 10. AddanACEthatdeniesaccessfromIPaddress192.168.1.2(HostA)to192.168.2.2(HostB): 11. AddanACEthatallowsaccessfromallotherIPaddresses: 12. ExittheACLdefinition:. Commands shown in the procedure include: policy | | | | 133; PING | 100.1.2.10 | (100.1.2.10) | | 100(128) bytes | of data.; ping: | sendmsg: | Operation | not | permitted; ping: | sendmsg: | Operation | not | permitted; ping: | sendmsg: | Operation | not | permitted; ping: | sendmsg: | Operation | not | permitted.

For 8360 AOS-CX 10_10, how do you document?

To document, follow the documented procedure: 1. VLANs1through100arecreatedsuccessfully,sotheswitchpromptreflectstherangeof 2. Thecommandinterface vlan 95-105failsforVLANs101through105,sotherangecontext 3. TheconfigurationincludesalltheVLANsandVLANinterfacesthatarecreatedsuccessfully 4. Theaddressconfiguredwiththecommandbgp router-id 5. ThehighestIPaddressonalltheloopbackinterfaces 6. ThehighestIPaddressonanyinterface 7. or one of these keywords: 8. or one of these keywords: 9. all: When All is enabled, no filters are applied to any of the debug logs, even if other submodules 10. tx: If enabled, only the replies and notifications sent out for the initial and incremental updates 11. rx: If enabled, only the transactions sent to the configuration and state database server are 12. NameserverIPaddresses:DNSserverIPsprovidedbytheDHCPservertotheclient.Maximum:3. Commands shown in the procedure include: Interface Guide; boot | | | 63; config-clear | | | 65; ip | | | 71; ping | | | 78; clear bgp.

For 8360 AOS-CX 10_10, what does the {usb}:/<FILE> command do?

The {usb}:/<FILE> command displaysMSTPconfigurationsforthegiveninstanceIDwithcorrespondingportdetails. | Parameter | | | | | Description | | | | | | <INSTANCE-ID> | | | | | SpecifiestheMSTPinstancenumber.Range:0to64. | | | | | vsx-peer ShowstheoutputfromtheVSXpeerswitch.Iftheswitchesdonot havetheVSXconfigurationortheISLisdown,theoutputfromthe VSXpeerswitchisnotdisplayed.Thisparameterisavailableon switchesthatsupportVSX. ShowsMSTPconfigurationsforthegiveninstanceIDwithcorrespondingportdetails. | Parameter | | | Description | | <INSTANCE-ID> | | | SpecifiestheMSTPinstancenumber.Range:0to64. | AOS-CX10.10Command-LineInterfaceGuide|(8360SwitchSeries) 1164 | Parameter | | | Description | | | | | <IFNAME> | | | Specifiesaninterface. Syntax: {usb}:/<FILE>.
For 8360 AOS-CX 10_10, what is the syntax of the {usb}:/<FILE> command?
The syntax of the {usb}:/<FILE> command is: {usb}:/<FILE>
For 8360 AOS-CX 10_10, what parameters are available for the {usb}:/<FILE> command?

Parameters for the {usb}:/<FILE> command: group <GROUP-IP>; source <SOURCE-IP>; vlan <VLAN-ID>; vrf <VRF-NAME>; <PORT-LIST>; vsx-peer; <AGENT-NAME>; group-by {count | sum | min | max | average}; over {seconds | minutes | hours | days} <DURATION>; rate over {seconds | minutes | hours | days} <DURATION>; <MONITOR-NAME>; <VALUE>.

Defining the condition for the watch named ipsla_status including all the specified list: switch(config-nae-agent)# set-condition watch event-log ipsla_status include all "servername","failure" count 3 Clearing the condition for the watch named ipsla_status including all the specified list: switch(config-nae-agent-condition)# clear-condition watch ipsla_status include all "servername","success" Defining the condition for the watch named ipsla_status excluding snmpd: switch(config-nae-agent-condition)# set-condition watch event-log crash_event exclude snmpd Removing the conditions associated with the NAE-Lite agent: switch(config-nae-agent)# no set-condition watch event-log ipsla_status all "servername","failure" include switch(config-nae-agent-condition)# no clear-condition watch
